prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年该科类最低录取位次分别为约2968名、1920名、3153名、2659名、2698名，整体呈宽幅波动走势。2022年位次大幅前移至1920名后，2023年回退至3153名，近两年（2024–2025）稳定在2650–2700名区间，2025年基准位次约2698名；该校在贵州省理科/物理类招生计划：2021–2023年均为40人，2024–2025年调整为35人，2026年计划仍为35人，与2025年持平，无扩招或缩招，对竞争格局无直接冲击。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中国人民解放军国防科技大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，隶属中央军委，是军队唯一进入国家"双一流"建设行列的综合性大学，在计算机、电子信息、航空航天等领域享有极高声誉，软科主榜排名因军事院校属性未纳入前200名，但实际办学层次与顶尖985相当；作为军事院校，该校在公开声誉监测数据中未出现负面舆情信号；抖音平台相关视频以"国防七子""最不能惹的大学"等标签传播，整体关注度较高，反映社会对该校的正面认知和报考热度；该校在计算机科学与技术、信息与通信工程、航空宇航科学与技术、系统科学等领域具有突出优势，第五轮学科评估数据因军事院校未公开披露，但上述学科长期处于国内领先地位，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信类专业在2024–2026年专业热度分析中持续被评为"高热推荐"或"推荐"，社会关注度与报考意愿维持高位；自动化类、航空航天类热度稳定。贵州省2026年高考总报名人数约29.9万，物理类考生估算约20.6万，与2025年基本持平；省控线方面，2025年物理类本科批387分、特殊类型招生控制线483分，较2024年（本科批380分、特殊类型482分）略有上升，反映整体竞争环境略有收紧；该校位于湖南省长沙市，属邻省高校，对贵州考生具有较好的地域接受度；学校在贵州的招生计划占比较为稳定，近年保持在35人左右，未出现大幅波动。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次2698名、2026年招生计划持平、贵州省考生规模基本稳定、省控线略有上升以及计算机/电子信息等王牌专业持续高热等因素，预计2026年该校在贵州理科/物理类的最低录取位次将略有前移（竞争略加剧）。预测最低位次约2668名，位次区间为2168–3168名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机科学与技术（天河拔尖班）
- 理论与应用力学（航天力学拔尖班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 计算机类（计算机科学与技术、软件工程、网络工程、信息安全等）
- 电子信息类（电子信息工程、电子科学与技术、通信工程等）
- 航空航天类（航空航天工程、飞行器动力工程、材料科学与工程）
- 自动化类（自动化、机器人工程、人工智能）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 大气科学类（大气科学、气象技术与工程）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次在2668名附近，区间2168–3168名。位次在区间下限（2168名以内）的考生可重点冲刺一档的天河拔尖班和航天力学拔尖班；位次在区间中段（2500–2800名）的考生应以二档的计算机类、电子信息类为主攻方向，兼顾航空航天类和自动化类；位次在区间上限（3000名以外）的考生可将三档大气科学类作为保底选择。该校所有专业均要求应届普通高中毕业生且政治面貌为中共党员或共青团员，报考时需注意资格审核。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for this subject category were approximately 2968, 1920, 3153, 2659, and 2698, showing a wide fluctuation trend. After a significant forward shift to 1920 in 2022, it retreated to 3153 in 2023, and stabilized in the 2650–2700 range in the recent two years (2024–2025), with a baseline ranking of about 2698 in 2025. The enrollment plan for this university in Guizhou Province for science/physics categories: 40 students from 2021 to 2023, adjusted to 35 students in 2024–2025, and the 2026 plan remains 35 students, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction, thus no direct impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: The National University of Defense Technology of the People's Liberation Army is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university, subordinate to the Central Military Commission. It is the only military university included in the national 'Double First-Class' construction list, enjoying a very high reputation in fields such as computer science, electronic information, and aerospace. Its main ranking on the Soft Science Ranking is not within the top 200 due to its military institution nature, but its actual level is comparable to top 985 universities. As a military university, it has not shown any negative public opinion signals in public reputation monitoring data. Related videos on the Douyin platform are tagged with labels such as 'Defense Seven Sons' and 'The Most Unprovokable University,' indicating high overall attention and reflecting positive public perception and application enthusiasm. The university has outstanding advantages in computer science and technology, information and communication engineering, aerospace science and technology, and systems science. Although the fifth round of discipline evaluation data is not publicly disclosed due to its military status, these disciplines have long been leading domestically, attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electronic information/communication majors have been consistently rated as 'highly recommended' or 'recommended' in the 2024–2026 major popularity analysis, maintaining high social attention and application willingness. Automation and aerospace majors have stable popularity. In 2026, the total number of Gaokao registrants in Guizhou Province is about 299,000, with an estimated 206,000 physics category candidates, roughly the same as 2025. Regarding provincial control lines, the 2025 physics category undergraduate batch line is 387 points, and the special type enrollment control line is 483 points, slightly higher than 2024 (undergraduate batch 380 points, special type 482 points), reflecting a slight tightening of the overall competitive environment. The university is located in Changsha City, Hunan Province, a neighboring province, and has good regional acceptance for Guizhou candidates. The university's enrollment plan in Guizhou has been relatively stable, remaining around 35 students in recent years, without significant fluctuations.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2698, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, the basically stable number of candidates in Guizhou Province, the slight increase in provincial control lines, and the sustained high popularity of flagship majors such as computer science and electronic information, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for this university in Guizhou's science/physics category in 2026 will slightly move forward (competition slightly intensifies). The predicted minimum ranking is about 2668, with a ranking range of 2168–3168.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Computer Science and Technology (Tianhe Top Class)
- Theoretical and Applied Mechanics (Aerospace Mechanics Top Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Computer Category (Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Network Engineering, Information Security, etc.)
- Electronic Information Category (Electronic Information Engineering, Electronic Science and Technology, Communication Engineering, etc.)
- Aerospace Category (Aerospace Engineering, Aircraft Power Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering)
- Automation Category (Automation, Robotics Engineering, Artificial Intelligence).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Atmospheric Science Category (Atmospheric Science, Meteorological Technology and Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is around 2668, with a range of 2168–3168. Candidates with rankings at the lower end of the range (within 2168) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1's Tianhe Top Class and Aerospace Mechanics Top Class. Candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (2500–2800) should target Tier 2's Computer Category and Electronic Information Category as main directions, while also considering Aerospace Category and Automation Category. Candidates with rankings at the upper end of the range (outside 3000) can use Tier 3's Atmospheric Science Category as a safety choice. All majors in this university require candidates to be fresh ordinary high school graduates with a political status of either Communist Party member or Communist Youth League member; applicants should pay attention to qualification review.

_translation.university_name_en: National University of Defense Technology of the People's Liberation Army
